text:
Asia/Singapore is UTC+7:20 (historical offset for 1257).  
US/Mountain is UTC-6:49 (historical offset for 1257).  
Time difference = (-6:49) - (7:20) = -14:09.  
9:00 - 14:09 = (9:00 - 14:09) = -5:09 → 24:00 - 5:09 = 18:51 previous day.  
June 2, 1257 9:00 Singapore → June 1, 1257 18:51 US/Mountain.  

FINAL_ANSWER: June 1, 1257 18:51
